g.text: This comic piece uses a mixture of Western notation, text, and clip
art to present a somewhat dissociative story for group musical (and
relies entirely on live sound made by participants. It has
no audio/multimedia samples; as a result, there's no use for "play
mode" in your web app. Please touch "guide" on the tab bar twice
with the links in the lower right
corner. If you see a link in the lower left corner, it's a diversion! It
will take you to (and from) a diﬀerent part of the piece. It's up to
you and the group to return to the previous frame, or not.
Happy improvising. Be creative and have fun!

svg.text: Tap the colored circle links to move through the piece.
